view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 failed
blocks.message: Step failed: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for maximum capacity is not validated as satisfied.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation failed: The requirement for maximum capacity is not validated as satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a maximum capacity of 12 people. However, the evidence indicates that only 3 participants are currently booked, which does not meet the requirement for the maximum capacity. This confirms a gap in the requirement coverage as the evidence does not support that the maximum capacity is satisfied.

gaps: Maximum capacity (12 people) not satisfied; only 3 participants booked.
